metadata.description: Microsoft Sentinel Analytics Rule: Privilege Escalation — Admin Role Assignment
metadata.nistControls: AC-6 (least privilege), AU-6 (audit review), AC-2 (account management)
metadata.mitreAttack: T1548 — Abuse Elevation Control Mechanism / Privilege Escalation
metadata.author: JSA AppSec
metadata.WHY: Any assignment to Global Administrator, Privileged Role Administrator, or Security Administrator is a high-risk event. Legitimate assignments are rare. Attackers who gain these roles own the tenant. This rule fires immediately — no threshold, no tolerance window.

metadata.description: The name of the Log Analytics workspace (Sentinel)

properties.description: Detects assignment of Global Administrator, Privileged Role Administrator, Security Administrator, or Privileged Authentication Administrator roles in Azure AD. Any such assignment requires immediate review. NIST AC-6, AC-2. MITRE T1548.
properties.query:
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where OperationName == "Add member to role"
| where Result == "success"
| extend
    TargetUser    = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName),
    RoleName      = tostring(TargetResources[1].displayName),
    InitiatedBy   = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| where RoleName in (
    "Global Administrator",
    "Privileged Role Administrator",
    "Security Administrator",
    "Privileged Authentication Administrator",
    "Exchange Administrator",
    "SharePoint Administrator"
  )
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    RoleName,
    TargetUser,
    InitiatedBy,
    CorrelationId,
    OperationName
